question: What is the current health status of customer X?
derivation_sql: INSERT INTO gold_cognimesh.customer_health (customer_id, name, region, total_orders, total_spend, days_since_last_order, ltv_segment, health_status) SELECT customer_id, name, region, total_orders, total_spend, days_since_last_order, ltv_segment, CASE WHEN days_since_last_order < 30 AND ltv_segment IN ('high', 'medium') THEN 'healthy' WHEN days_since_last_order < 90 THEN 'warning' ELSE 'critical' END FROM silver.customer_profiles
